query:
SELECT DISTINCT e.id, e.parent_agent_id, e.child_agent_id,
                            e.created_at as "created_at!: chrono::DateTime<chrono::Utc>"
            FROM edges e
            JOIN agents a ON a.id = e.parent_agent_id OR a.id = e.child_agent_id
            WHERE a.graph_id = $1
            ORDER BY e.created_at ASC
